stemHtml: What is the principle of an EVS (Enhanced Vision System)?

options.a: To generate a real-time image on the PFD or on the ND using three-dimensional data.
options.b: To provide the crew with a real-time image of the flight crew compartment door area.
options.c: To generate a real-time image on the PFD or on the HUD using imaging sensors.
options.d: To provide the crew with a real-time image of the engine nacelles.
